name: command-execute-pattern
description: status/costs commands follow execute(args...) -> Result<(), String> with project_override: Option<&Path> threaded from main.rs run_command. All DB opens guarded by PathBuf::from(&path).exists() check to handle missing DBs gracefully.

name: scaffold-cmds-execute-pattern
description: init/spec/hooks commands expose standalone execute functions — no subcommand parsing, clean pub fn execute(args...) -> Result<(), String> signatures — wiring handled by lead in mod.rs + main.rs

content: stop/clean/nudge commands follow execute(args...) -> Result<(), String> with project_override: Option<&Path>. stop uses agent_name: &str, force: bool, clean_worktree: bool, json: bool. nudge uses agent_name: &str, message: Option<&str>, from: &str, force: bool, json: bool.

Log command uses LogArgs with LogSubcommand enum (SessionStart/SessionEnd). SessionStart and SessionEnd take --agent (required) and --json flags. SessionEnd also takes --exit-code. Pattern matches existing mail/hooks subcommand style.
mail send/reply --agent flag should use alias = 'from' so that --from works (all agent definitions and overstory docs use --from).

description: grove clean --worktrees does not delete branches, causing them to accumulate after every run.
resolution: Link do_branches to do_worktrees: let do_branches = all || branches || worktrees.

description: grove sling gives confusing hierarchy error for unknown capability because hierarchy check runs before manifest/capability check.
resolution: Move load_manifest + capability validation before validate_hierarchy in sling::execute.

name: group-json-storage
description: Group command uses groups.json in .overstory/ for storage; load with fs::read_to_string + serde_json::from_str, save with serde_json::to_string_pretty + fs::write

content: MailFilters struct uses from_agent and to_agent fields (not from/to); MailMessage struct uses from and to. Always check types.rs before writing filter structs.

description: agents.rs queried sessions.db for running agents instead of reading .overstory/agent-manifest.json.
resolution: Rewrite execute_discover to use load_manifest_from_project(root, '.overstory/agent-manifest.json') and display AgentDefinition structs. Remove sessions.db dependency.

content: grove group create allows empty member_issue_ids — groups can be created without issues and populated later via grove group add.

name: monitor-daemon-pattern
description: grove monitor start/stop/status follows exact coordinator.rs pattern: PID file (.overstory/monitor.pid), log file (.overstory/logs/monitor.log), daemon child via std::process::Command::spawn() redirected to log file, --foreground flag for daemon child to run poll loop, session registered in sessions.db (booting→working), SIGTERM on stop with 5s wait. Checks config.watchdog.tier2_enabled before start.
